data_description.ha_callback_url: Optional. Required only for DW Spectrum motion sensors. Use a local or remote Home Assistant URL that the DW server can reach.

data_description.enable_rtsp: You'll get an MJPEG stream regardless of this option. Only enable RTSP if you need it — for example, to convert the feed to WebRTC format.
data_description.rtsp_main_stream: Expose the full-resolution primary RTSP stream (stream=0).
data_description.rtsp_sub_stream: Expose the lower-resolution secondary RTSP stream (stream=1).
